signal_class_brief:
This track continues the V1 technical analysis baseline. The current best strategy uses EMA crossover (EMA12/EMA26) with ADX regime filter, RSI momentum confirmation, EMA50 macro trend filter, volume filter, and a 2-bar ADX hysteresis exit.

IMPORTANT: 55 iterations have been run. The strategy is at a local optimum. Read RESEARCH_CONTEXT.md before proposing anything. Key failure patterns to avoid:
  - ATR trailing stop to replace trend_fading: tried ~25 times, never worked.
  - ADX threshold above 22: kills W2/W3 trades.
  - Mean-reversion (BB lower touch): catastrophic failure.
  - The W1 problem (Mar-Jun 2024, choppy regime) is structural and cannot be fixed with TA.

This track exists as the benchmark. All other V2 tracks must beat fitness +0.4714 to be considered improvements.
reducibility_note: Weak reducibility. TA indicators are mathematical transformations of OHLCV — they do not add information, only extract patterns. On liquid, algorithmically-traded crypto markets, reflexive edge is thin and unstable. The 55-iteration V1 run confirmed the ceiling at +0.4714.
exploration_hints: Stochastic RSI: ta.momentum.stochrsi(close, window=14, smooth1=3, smooth2=3) — has not been tried.
Dual-timeframe RSI: resample close to 4h, compute RSI, align back to 1h; require 4h RSI > 50 at entry.
min_volume_ma parametric sweep: currently 20, not tested at 10, 15, 25, 30.
Do NOT propose: ATR trailing stop exits, removing trend_fading, ADX threshold > 22, mean-reversion entries.
